creator: rysto32@gmail.com
text:
Oops, I got the reproduction scenario slightly wrong.  It should have
been (note the -lv arguments to the second dtrace invocation):

# kldload dtraceall
# kldload hwpmc
# dtrace -n 'fbt:hwpmc::'
# kldunload hwpmc
# dtrace -lvn 'fbt:hwpmc::'

The panic is:
#0  doadump (textdump=1)
    at /usr/home/rstone/freebsd/head_2/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:266
266             if (textdump && textdump_pending) {
(kgdb) #0  doadump (textdump=1)
    at /usr/home/rstone/freebsd/head_2/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:266
#1  0xffffffff808b3819 in kern_reboot (howto=260)
    at /usr/home/rstone/freebsd/head_2/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:449
#2  0xffffffff808b324a in panic (fmt=0x0)
    at /usr/home/rstone/freebsd/head_2/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:637
#3  0xffffffff80bb4930 in trap_fatal (frame=0x9, eva=Variable "eva" is not avail
able.
)
    at /usr/home/rstone/freebsd/head_2/sys/amd64/amd64/trap.c:852
#4  0xffffffff80bb50be in trap (frame=0xffffff8025f575e0)
    at /usr/home/rstone/freebsd/head_2/sys/amd64/amd64/trap.c:599
#5  0xffffffff80b9f5d3 in calltrap ()
    at /usr/home/rstone/freebsd/head_2/sys/amd64/amd64/exception.S:228
#6  0xffffffff80893f31 in linker_ctf_get (file=0xfffffe000563a400,
    lc=0xffffff8025f57790)
    at /usr/home/rstone/freebsd/head_2/sys/kern/kern_linker.c:711#7
0xffffffff81a9d77e in fbt_getargdesc (arg=Variable "arg" is not
available.
)
    at /usr/home/rstone/freebsd/head_2/sys/modules/dtrace/fbt/../../../cddl/dev/
fbt/fbt.c:1264
#8  0xffffffff8183ac84 in dtrace_ioctl (dev=Variable "dev" is not available.
) at dtrace_ioctl.c:613
#9  0xffffffff807a195a in devfs_ioctl_f (fp=0xfffffe00052aa140,
    com=3238819849, data=Variable "data" is not available.
)
    at /usr/home/rstone/freebsd/head_2/sys/fs/devfs/devfs_vnops.c:757
#10 0xffffffff8090514d in kern_ioctl (td=Variable "td" is not available.
) at file.h:287
#11 0xffffffff809053ed in sys_ioctl (td=0xfffffe00054ed900,
    uap=0xffffff8025f57bb0)
    at /usr/home/rstone/freebsd/head_2/sys/kern/sys_generic.c:691
#12 0xffffffff80bb3f60 in amd64_syscall (td=0xfffffe00054ed900, traced=0)
    at subr_syscall.c:135
#13 0xffffffff80b9f8b7 in Xfast_syscall ()
    at /usr/home/rstone/freebsd/head_2/sys/amd64/amd64/exception.S:387
#14 0x0000000801a47e3c in ?? ()
